verse_text: And Samson took hold of the two pillars of the house, the very two which held up the house, and he leaned himself against them. He grasped one with his right hand and the other with his left,

links.context: Dagon (lit. "a fish") was one of the gods of the Philistines, a seafaring people, and was represented by a man's torso with the tail of a fish. Dagon had two temples mentioned in the Bible, one at Gaza ([[JDG.16:21]]-30) and one at Ashdod (1Kg 5:5; 1Ch 10:10).
